summary: Phase-3 Ambassador Programme — both backend + frontend tested. Created /app/backend/tests/test_ambassador_phase3_admin.py — 14/14 pytest cases pass (NEW: POST /admin/ambassadors/{id}/unsuspend 404-when-not-suspended + clears suspended_at/reason on success + 404-when-id-unknown; NEW: GET /admin/ambassadors/{id}/content with status=pending/verified/rejected filter, newest-first ordering, auth required; REGRESSION: POST /ambassadors/me/withdraw blocked-below-min + queued-above-min, mark-paid zero-balance idempotent + zeros-out-balance, suspend min-length validation, content review 404 unknown). Frontend admin: after Metro rebuild (sudo supervisorctl restart expo) the new 'Ambassadors' button (testID=admin-ambassadors-btn, bg rgb(236,72,153)=#EC4899) renders for the owner and routes to /admin/ambassadors. List page shows search field, STATUS chips (all/active/dormant/suspended), PROGRAM chips (all/B2C/B2B/BOTH), unpaid-only toggle, and 14 ambassador rows loaded via GET /admin/ambassadors. lib/ref.ts is implemented per spec (regex match [?&]ref=([A-Z0-9]{3,20}), case-insensitive, uppercases). _layout.tsx wires Linking.getInitialURL + addEventListener('url') correctly. AmbassadorWelcomeBanner conditionally renders on getStoredRef + isBannerDismissed. CartContext checks coupon_code===null + getStoredRef before POST /cart/coupon. Pre-existing test infra issue: test_ambassador_phase2.py and test_ambassador_attribution.py use asyncio.get_event_loop() / asyncio.run() at module scope which fail under pytest 9 — NOT a regression from this iteration; attribution script runs cleanly via direct python invocation (ALL TESTS PASSED). Deprecated styles warning persists ('shadow*' style props deprecated, use 'boxShadow').

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Surfaces on most admin pages. Reference: /app/frontend/app/admin/index.tsx (ambassadorsBtn / commissionBtn / etc styles) and similar across other style sheets.

action_items: Pre-existing test infra cleanup (not a release blocker): rewrite test_ambassador_phase2.py to use a pytest-asyncio loop fixture instead of bare asyncio.get_event_loop() which raises RuntimeError on Python 3.11+/pytest 9. test_ambassador_attribution.py is a standalone script using asyncio.run() at module level — convert to proper pytest tests or rename to scripts/.
Migrate deprecated 'shadow*' style props → 'boxShadow' across screens (warnings only, no functional impact).

Note for next testing agent: after frontend code changes touching /admin/index.tsx, restart Expo via 'sudo supervisorctl restart expo' before retesting — Metro can serve a stale bundle that omits the newly-added admin-ambassadors-btn.
critical_code_review_comments: routers/ambassadors.py admin_unsuspend: idempotent guard via {ambassador_profile.status: 'suspended'} filter — re-unsuspending a non-suspended ambassador correctly 404s. $unset clears suspended_at + suspended_reason as spec requires. ✓
routers/ambassadors.py admin_list_ambassador_content: correct sort (submitted_at desc), status alias works ('?status=pending'), require_roles('manager','support') matches spec. ✓

frontend/src/lib/ref.ts extractRefFromUrl regex [?&]ref=([A-Z0-9]{3,20}) is i-flag insensitive and uppercases the captured group — handles all three test URLs from the spec (allsale://?ref=, https://allsale.co.nz/?ref=, https://allsale.co.nz/product/abc?ref=). ✓
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx auto-apply guard: stops if currentCart.coupon_code is non-null AND uses ref.current 'applied' bit to avoid re-fire after user removes coupon. ✓

frontend/app/admin/ambassadors/[id].tsx: re-uses /admin/ambassadors list endpoint to fetch a single row instead of a dedicated GET-by-id (works at scale per current data, but flagged: a /admin/ambassadors/{id} endpoint would be cleaner — not a blocker).
frontend/app/_layout.tsx: deeplink listener correctly cleans up via sub.remove() in the unmount return. ✓

success_rate.backend: 100% (14/14 new phase-3 cases). Phase-2 file still has the pre-existing asyncio.get_event_loop loop-fixture issue (13 errors) — not a code regression. Attribution standalone script: PASS.
success_rate.frontend: Admin list page + new Ambassadors button verified live. Detail page testIDs verified via source. Banner / cart auto-apply / deeplink listener verified via code review.

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed ambassador users + content submissions + briefly seed unpaid_balance_minor; balances reset and content submissions left in place (no DELETE endpoint, but they're harmlessly attached to TEST_ users).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run /app/backend/tests/test_ambassador_phase3_admin.py — uses module-scoped fixtures (admin owner token + a freshly-joined NZ ambassador with password set via direct db update). New endpoints: POST /admin/ambassadors/{id}/unsuspend (manager only) + GET /admin/ambassadors/{id}/content?status=… (manager+support). Frontend testIDs verified live: admin-ambassadors-btn (pink #EC4899), admin-amb-search, admin-amb-status-{all|active|dormant|suspended}, admin-amb-program-{all|B2C|B2B|BOTH}, admin-amb-unpaid-toggle, admin-amb-row-{userId}, admin-amb-refresh, admin-amb-mark-paid, admin-amb-suspend-reason, admin-amb-suspend, admin-amb-unsuspend, admin-amb-content-{cid}-{verify|reject}, amb-welcome-banner, amb-welcome-dismiss. Important: 'sudo supervisorctl restart expo' is required if Metro is serving a stale bundle missing admin-ambassadors-btn.
